  "findings": [
    "Motor disconnect switch is not within sight of the motor location as required by code."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Relocate the disconnect switch to a compliant location within sight of the motor, or install a lockable disconnecting means in accordance with the exceptions of NEC Art. 430."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC Article 430.102 requires a disconnecting means to be located in sight from the motor location and the driven machinery, unless an exception applies (such as being capable of being locked in the open position with a permanent locking provision). Since the disconnect is not within sight, it fails compliance unless specific engineered lockable provisions are verified and approved.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Article 430.102"
  ]
}
